subjectIncludes: Expose Dev Hub business source pipeline triage
Expose Dev Hub business source triage

systemArea: Dev Hub business source pipeline visibility
whatChanged: Added a compact read-only Business Sources triage to Dev Hub that groups FUB/CRM, KPI/Supabase, Sheets/Owners, ClickUp, and Drive/Docs by Foundation Done source maturity flow.
whatItDoes: The Dev Hub now shows which business sources are extracted, atomized, synthesized, routed, and resolved, and which are merely connected, extracted-only, stale, or waiting in route review.
whyItMatters: Steve wants one hub at a time with working data, not more dashboard-only wiring. This makes the money/CRM/Sheets/ClickUp/Drive source families visible before Director recommendations depend on them.
whereItLives: lib/dev-hub-business-source-pipeline-triage.js compact business-source projection, validation, and dogfood proof
lib/dev-team-hub.js businessSourcePipelineTriage payload wiring from the existing Foundation Done bar
public/dev-business-source-pipeline-triage.js standalone renderer on Dev Hub snapshot events
scripts/process-dev-hub-business-source-pipeline-triage-check.mjs focused proof and guarded close-card path
proofStatus: Focused proof dogfoods the exact failure modes: stale/extracted-only business sources must not be counted complete, and any source runtime, intelligence row, route/destination, backlog/Scoper/Portfolio, Harlan, model, or external write fails validation. Live readback validates current business source flow with bounded rows and no FUB/KPI/Sheets/ClickUp/Drive sync or extraction.
reviewNext: Use the Business Sources panel to pick one explicit stale family repair. Do not run connector sync, extraction, atom writes, routing, route apply, or Scoper/backlog promotion from this readback.
knownLimits: This is a read-only visibility slice; it does not repair stale business-source flow.
This does not run FUB, KPI, Sheets, ClickUp, Drive, connector probes, live extraction, model calls, Harlan, or external writes.
This does not write atoms, facts, synthesis rows, action routes, backlog cards, Scoper cards, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, or approval records.
Future business-source repairs must choose one family and dogfood the exact source-flow failure mode.
